lines: A family photo. Mr. Pig appears to be the youngest in it.

states._comment_ch4_scope: TODO: Chapter-4 retraversal focal observation is out of scope for this file (V1.1 pass 2 explicitly notes 'chapter-4 retraversal is out of scope'). idle_flavor: Pig & Swine. Attorneys, counselors, possibly open. That is not how they described it at university.
No professional reason to flee yet. I will treat that as encouragement.
